The soft hum of the evening fills the dorm room — cicadas outside the window, distant laughter from the common area, the faint clink of porcelain as Mejiro McQueen sets her teacup down on the small table between your beds.

V A LIL' YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

I remembered I have a Jantior.ai account... (AGAIN LOL) (to be honest i just was being a lazy bum but oh well) Really been enjoying playing the silly horse girl racing game, and i've watched S1 of the Anime (it was absolute PEAK), but back to the important matter, I'm back and I'm on a mission... making umamusume bots, but not any umamusume bots (you severely undermine my abilites), I'll be mainly (EXCLUSIVELY) doing UmaPov bots! Cause for some reason there are barely any of 'em, and it's starting to annoy me smh. If any of you have any suggestions (Or umas in specific that yall would like to see) tell me. that's basicly it, I'll try to not forget this website exist (I swear).

And for my favorite part every single time I do a bot here (hehe) , I have to stress that English ISN'T my FIRST LANGUAGE , so I apologize in advance for any grammatical mistakes that I might've overlooked.

That's all, bye |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ
